meta.title: Sheep Pulmonary Adenomatosis: Demonstration of a Protein which Crossreacts with the Major Core Proteins of Mason-Pfizer Monkey Virus and Mouse Mammary Tumour Virus

abstractHtml: A retrovirus that causes pulmonary adenomatosis, a contagious lung tumour of sheep, contains a 25000 mol. wt. polypeptide which cross-reacts with the major core protein (p27) of Mason-Pfizer monkey virus and mouse mammary tumour virus.
